source: scripts/agentic/design-reference-capture.ts --screen settings (protocol captureScreenshot, hiDpi, target kind=main; sandboxHome:true, triggerBuiltin builtin/settings)
motion: starfield phase is capture-time state (fx shader id 3)
backdrop: user's live desktop (NOT the synthetic fixture backdrop)

fixture.command: triggerBuiltin builtin/settings (direct-open path — opened_from_main_menu unset, Escape closes the window)
fixture.contextZone: fixture-variable capture state (model pill read 'Brain · GPT-5.6 SOL')
fixture.rows: iconless (settingsRows.authoredIconHintsVsResolvedNone); 'Reset Window Positions' present but below the fold
fixture.activeFooter: receipt PENDING — source-likely Run ↵ / Actions ⌘K (settingsFooter.nativeRunVsGpuiOpenHint); the GPUI capture band is the empty 32px rail reservation, the 36px native host is a separate overlay window

pixelReceipts.firstSectionSlot: 26px legacy slot / 6px top padding (selected surface starts ~89pt: header 58 + list padding 4 + first slot 26 + window edge) — NOT the themed 28/4
pixelReceipts.note: sandboxHome:true did NOT pin the 11-row base census: windowState.hasCustomPositions was already true by first settings render (driver show/position writes a window-state entry, or the sandbox dir was reused). Record customPositionsAtCensus on every retake; never assume sandboxHome implies a fresh window-state store.
